description: Firefox cookies parser reads cookies.sqlite moz_cookies table and emits BrowserEvent per cookie
steps: Query moz_cookies: host, name, path, creationTime, expiry, isSecure, isHttpOnly, sameSite
Filter WHERE creationTime > 0, ORDER BY creationTime ASC
Attrs: host, name, path, expiry (i64), is_secure (bool), is_httponly (bool), samesite (i32)
